title: Bartoline Multi Purpose Powder Filler 450g - Strong & Smooth Finish for Plaster, Wood, Brick & Stone – Easy to Mix & Sand
features: LIMITLESS APPLICATION: Ideal for plaster, wood, brick, stone, and more; perfect for filling cracks, holes, and surface imperfections before painting or wallpapering.
EASY TO MIX & USE: Simply add water for a smooth, lump-free paste; dries white for a seamless finish, ready to paint or wallpaper.
STRONG ADHESION: High-quality formulation does not shrink and adheres firmly to surfaces, ensuring long-lasting, durable repairs.
EFFORTLESS SANDING: Once set, it can be easily sanded to a fine, smooth finish; accepts nails and screws without crumbling.
INTERIOR & EXTERIOR USE: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor repairs; seal with oil-based paint or varnish for added weather resistance.
description: Bartoline Multi Purpose Powder Filler is specially formulated for repairs to plaster, plasterboard, wood, brick, stone and most other building materials. Ideal for preparing surfaces before painting or wallpapering. Use Bartoline Multi Purpose Powder Filler to fill cracks and holes in walls, ceilings and around door frames and skirting boards. Bartoline Multi Purpose Powder Filler gives a smooth surface perfect for painting or wallpapering. Easy to mix, simple to use. Does not shrink. Has excellent adhesive properties which keep the filler firmly in position. Easily sanded, giving a smooth surface which will take nails and screws when set. Suitable for exterior use providing it is sealed with paint or varnish when dry.
